Proof-backed upgrade right

A result becomes useful
only when it earns
the right to propagate.

Run a local GoalOS upgrade ceremony: a candidate artifact is proposed, tested, challenged, canaried, monitored, and either held for human review, rejected, or rolled back. The score helps. The gates decide.

Run the upgrade foundryOpen Selection Gate

No user data wanted. No account. No cookies. No analytics. No storage. No wallet. No network request. No transaction broadcast. Do not enter personal, confidential, regulated, customer, wallet, seed phrase, private-key, or proprietary information.

LOCAL · HUMAN REVIEW · NO EXTERNAL ACTION
Uright
COMMIT
PROVE
SELECT
CANARY
ROLLBACK
REVIEW
0upgrade candidates
0canary stages
0rollback drills
01

Propose a public-safe upgrade

This is a local demonstration. The proposal is never submitted and never stored.
02

Watch the upgrade ceremony

Upgrade density—
Gate resultNOT RUN
AuthorityNONE
03

Hard gates

A candidate may score well and still fail. Proof validity, eval pass, scope, canary, challenge window, rollback readiness, and claim boundary are mandatory gates.

04

Selection certificate

Run the gate to generate a SelectionCertificate.
GoalOSCommit

The institution states the upgrade objective, authority, constraints, risk, evaluators, and rollback obligations.

ProofPacket

The run emits trace roots, output hashes, eval results, cost, latency, and evidence pointers.

SelectionCertificate

The candidate is admitted, rejected, canaried, paused, or rolled back by gates rather than narrative.

RollbackReceipt

Every promoted candidate keeps a recovery target before it receives wider authority.

© MontrealAI · Proof-Backed Upgrade Foundry · browser-local public demonstration · no user data wanted · no wallet · no network · no transaction broadcast · Privacy · Terms · Legal · AGIALPHA Boundary
